auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to manage your expenses
auth.register_subtitle: Create a new account to start managing your expenses

groups.title: My Groups
groups.description: Manage your expense groups and add new expenses.
groups.no_groups_desc: Start splitting expenses by creating a new group now.

group_details.no_debts: No debts in the group yet or everyone is settled.

errors.delete_participant_has_expenses: You cannot delete this person because they have paid expenses. Delete the expenses first.
errors.delete_participant_has_splits: You cannot delete this person because they are part of an expense (they owe money). Update the expense first.
errors.db_error_member_delete: Database error: Failed to delete member.
errors.db_error_expense_delete: Database error: Failed to delete expense.
errors.expense_update_error: Failed to update expense (may be a permission issue).
errors.login_failed: Invalid credentials or email not confirmed.

landing.hero_subtitle: Travel with friends, go out for dinner, or share costs with roommates. FairSplit calculates everything for you.
landing.feat_1_desc: Create groups and add expenses in seconds.
landing.feat_2_desc: Spend in ₺, $ or €, don't worry about exchange rates.
landing.feat_3_desc: Split expenses only with selected participants, not everyone.
landing.feat_4_desc: Start using it immediately, store data in your browser.
landing.feat_5_desc: Available in English, Turkish, German, and Spanish.
landing.feat_6_desc: Always with you with its mobile-compatible structure.
landing.cta_subtitle: Start managing your group expenses like a pro today. It's free and always will be.
